See your reading progress with a beautiful progress bar. Track which articles you've completed and pick up where you left off.
Use OpenAI to summarize, ask questions, and explain text.

Make a OpenAI models work with web page text for you.

1️⃣ You'll need OpenAI api key. Here is link to obtain it: https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys.
2️⃣ Select text.
3️⃣ Choose "OpenAI API Explorer - TextAigist" -> "Summarize" or any other option, like "Answer the question" (if the the question is selected). Or even ask your own question about selected text with "Ask question about selected text" menu item.
❇️ See the summary from the OpenAI model as a popup window and the price (for example, the summary of a page chapter costs $0.000253)

Features:
ℹ️ Pick one of many OpenAI models available
ℹ️ Ask model anything about selected text like, in this case selected text is the context for the answer
ℹ️ Create custom menu item to ask your own questions about selected text (like "explain it in Turkish language for 14 year old", or "make a tweet out of this text, add emoji and excitement").

Security notes:
🔒 API key stored in your browser and used for OpenAI open API calls only.
🔒 The selected text is sent directly to the OpenAI API and is not stored anywhere. The OpenAI response is the summary itself; it is displayed on your screen and is not stored anywhere.

Feedback, questions, comments are highly appreciated: info@textaigist.online
Notion to Slides by Slides Generator

Turn any public Notion page into beautiful presentation slides with just a few clicks.

Supports most Notion page content types…

Turn any public Notion page into beautiful presentation slides with just a few clicks.

Supports most Notion page content types including:
- Text
- Headings
- Bulleted lists
- Numbered lists
- Toggles
- Quotes
- Callouts
- Equation blocks
- Todos (checkboxes)
- Images
- Videos
- Links
- Code blocks

On a Notion page, click "Share". Under "General access", select "Anyone on the web with link". Open up your extension and select Notion to Slides. This will open up a preview under which 

Headings and blank paragraphs will cause a new slide to be created. Slides Generator will also preserve formatting from your Notion page such as bold, italics, underline and hyperlinks.

These features will improve your presentation experience, help you avoid context switching and enable easy sharing:
- Embedded websites: Present from one place. We detect links in your content and embed websites and videos directly into your slides.
- PPTX export: Easily share your presentations by exporting to PPTX.
- Device-optimized: Present anywhere. Whether it be a big screen, a phone, tablet, or desktop, engage your users on any device.
- Easy styling: Present in style. Quickly and easily personalize your presentations with minimal effort.
Engage with your customers and expand your business with the WhatsApp automation tool

Are you ready to elevate your WhatsApp communication to a new level? With Prospecta, the innovative Google Chrome extension, this is not just possible - it's incredibly easy!


🌟 Who Is It For? 🌟
- Dynamic Professionals

🔥 Exclusive Features: 🔥

Whether it's an explanatory video, an attractive image, an informative audio, a personal voice recording, or important documents, Prospecta makes it easy to include any type of multimedia file in your mass communications, ensuring your message stands out and captures the desired attention.

🔥 Why Prospecta? 🔥
WhatsApp is more than just a messaging app - it's a vital communication tool. With Prospecta, you unlock the true potential of WhatsApp. Ideal for marketing campaigns, corporate communication, and mass announcements, this extension ensures efficiency and impact in your communication strategies.

Respect WhatsApp's policies. Avoid spam and ensure you have consent to send messages.

Transform your way of communicating on WhatsApp. Try Prospecta today and feel the difference!

ScreenSheet - Screenshots to xlsx, csv and more
Transform screenshots into spreadsheets in one click

Tired of manually copying tables? We've got you covered.

ScreenSheet is your go-to solution for turning any visual data into actionable insights.
Transform screenshots into spreadsheets in one click.

🚀 Key Features 🚀

📸 Smart Capture & Extract → Easily select any area on your screen and instantly convert it into a table. Simple, fast, and user-friendly

🧠 Intelligent Data Conversion → Analyze and structure data from various visual formats, ensuring accurate tabular extraction.

📂 Versatile Output Formats → Extract and convert data into xlsx, csv, md, and json formats for seamless integration with your workflow.

🔗 Easy Download & Share → Copy or download extracted data in a single click. Share with your team or save it for later.


🧩Why Choose ScreenSheet?🧩

✅ Save Hours of Manual Data Entry: What used to take hours now takes seconds.
✅ Enhance Data Accuracy: Eliminate human errors in data transcription.
✅ Boost Your Productivity: Streamline your research and data analysis processes.
✅ Versatile Applications: Perfect for financial analysis, academic research, business intelligence, and more.


🕹️How It Works🕹️

1️⃣ Select the area on your screen containing the data you want to extract.
2️⃣ Click the convert icon to capture and process the image.
3️⃣ Review the extracted data and choose your preferred output format.
4️⃣ Copy, download, or directly integrate the data with your favorite tools.


Whether you're dealing with financial reports, research papers, or complex datasets, ScreenSheet simplifies your data extraction process, allowing you to focus on what truly matters - analyzing and utilizing your data.

Try ScreenSheet today and experience the future of data extraction!

Web Citation Generator - Fast & Accurate APA, MLA, Chicago Formatter
Instantly generate web citations in APA, MLA, Chicago & more. Auto-fetches info & saves history. Your multi-format citation expert.

Say goodbye to formatting headaches with the Web Citation Generator.
This ultimate tool streamlines your bibliography creation. With one click, it fetches webpage details and formats them into a perfect citation, letting you focus on your work, not on citation rules.

Explore the Key Features:
🔹 One-Click Auto-Fetching:
Our smart technology automatically scans the webpage and pulls key information like the title, URL, and publisher name, saving you valuable time and effort. Need to make adjustments? The intuitive "Edit" mode gives you full control to add authors, publication dates, and more.
🔹 Comprehensive Style Support:
Switch between a wide variety of major citation styles instantly. Whether you need APA, MLA, Chicago, AMA, or others, our generator ensures your citations are always accurate and consistent with the required format.
🔹 Real-Time Citation Preview:
No more guessing! As you select a style or edit information, the citation preview updates in real-time. You see exactly what you’re getting, ensuring the final output is flawless before you even copy it.
🔹 Effortless History Management:
Never lose a source again. The extension automatically saves every citation you generate to a "History" tab. You can easily access, review, and copy past citations at any time, making it the perfect companion for large research projects.
🔹 Clean & Intuitive Interface:
Designed with simplicity in mind. The clean dashboard allows you to generate citations in seconds without a steep learning curve. All features are clearly laid out for a seamless and efficient user experience.
🔹 Secure & Private:
Your research is your own. All generated citation data is stored locally on your computer. We never upload or analyze your information, guaranteeing your privacy and giving you complete control over your data.

How It Works: Effortless Citations in Seconds
1. Open on Your Source Page: Navigate to the article, study, or webpage you want to cite and click the Citation Generator icon in your browser toolbar.
2. Select Your Style: The extension automatically populates the title and URL. Simply choose your required format (APA, MLA, Chicago, etc.) from the dropdown menu.
3. Copy and Paste: Review the real-time preview to ensure accuracy. Add any additional details if needed, then click the "Copy" button. Your perfectly formatted citation is now ready to be pasted into your document.

Perfect For:
Students: Ace your research papers, essays, and assignments with perfectly formatted bibliographies.
Researchers & Academics: Maintain accuracy and consistency across all your scholarly work.
Writers, Journalists & Bloggers: Easily credit your sources and add credibility to your content without interrupting your workflow.
Anyone who needs to quickly and reliably cite a web source.

Privacy Policy:
Your data is never shared with anyone, including the add-on owner.
We adhere to privacy laws (specifically GDPR and the California Privacy Act) to protect your data.
Install Web Citation Generator today and transform the way you cite. Make your academic and professional life simpler and more efficient than ever before.

With Set a Reminder, you can add tasks by voice or text. A daily reminder app for tasks, meetings, habits, calls. Quick and easy!

Stop losing track of important tasks and meetings. With Set a Reminder, you can capture everything instantly — by voice or text — so you never miss what matters.

🔔 Create a Reminder in Seconds
How to set a reminder without the hassle? Click, speak, or type — and it's done. No complex menus, no opening websites, no navigating away — just a couple of quick actions. Whether it's a one-time task or a daily routine, you can set a reminder for anything in just a few seconds.

📈 Your Personal Productivity Powerhouse
1️⃣ Work: Set a meeting reminder for a stand-up or text appointment reminders for a follow-up.
2️⃣ Life: Remind me to buy groceries, schedule a reminder call with a friend, or never miss a birthday.
3️⃣ Habits: Create a daily reminder to drink water, take a break, or meditate.
4️⃣ Planning: Use it as a task manager to outline your day or a quick voice-to-notes tool for ideas.

💎 The Core Advantage: Just Say and Done
Our philosophy is built on speed. The moment a thought strikes — whether it's a to-do or a crucial appointment — just activate the extension and say it. Create a reminder or add a reminder by voice for any task, and it's captured instantly. One click — add reminder. Get back to work.

🎙️ Forget Clicking, Start Talking — The Power of Voice
Why get distracted by typing when you can just speak? With our voice reminder extension, you simply click the icon and say a phrase naturally. We've built advanced speech-to-text technology that accurately captures every word. You can use any phrases to set a reminder:

💬 take a break in 30 minutes
💬 set a reminder to call a friend tomorrow at 11 am
💬 in 2 hours, call a courier
💬 set a reminder for me to submit the report to my boss
💬 remind me tomorrow at 1 pm that my sister is arriving on Monday
💬 set a reminder for next week, Tuesday at 8 am – that mom arrives

⚡ Quick Text Entry — When Silence Wins
Not in the mood to speak? Just type. Besides voice memos, the app allows you to create text notes. Use text input when you're on a call, listening to music, or prefer quiet focus. Voice or text, whatever works for you.

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts for Power Users
For those who live at the keyboard, we've got you covered. Use hotkeys to open the extension instantly — no mouse needed. Start adding reminders without lifting your hands from the keyboard.

💠 Multi-Purpose Tool
Use it as your daily planner for work tasks, a place for voice notes, or to set appointment reminders for anything — from meetings to personal events. Perfect for daily reminders like medication, workouts, or journaling.

You choose how to use this extension:
1. Meeting reminder — never miss a call, stand-up, or deadline
2. Calendar planner — organize your day in seconds
3. Appointment reminder app — keep every commitment on track
4. Your choice — pick what works for you, whether it's one purpose or all of them

🔄 Seamless Google Calendar™ Sync — With Full Control
If you've been using an iPhone reminders app or an Android reminders app, you know the struggle — your reminders stay on your phone, not on your PC or laptop. Set a Reminder changes that. Just install our extension, connect your Google Calendar, and everything you create in this extension will instantly appear on your mobile device as Google reminders. 

🌐 Works Completely Offline
No internet? No problem. Set a Reminder works fully offline — create, edit, and receive notifications without any connection. Your reminders are stored locally and sync automatically when you're back online. Perfect for flights, commutes, or areas with spotty coverage.

🔒 Privacy First — Your Data Stays Yours
We take your privacy seriously. We don't sell or analyze your personal data. Your reminders, notes, and habits are private by design. With optional Google Calendar sync, you choose what leaves your device. Just a tool that respects you.

📝 Rich Notes, Not Just Titles
Need to capture more than a quick reminder? Use the details section to store meeting agendas, shopping lists, or client notes. It's not just a reminder — it's a lightweight note-taking tool that keeps all your context in one place.

✨ Ready to experience the future of reminders?
Stop letting tasks slip your mind. Install Set a Reminder now and turn your thoughts into scheduled actions with just your voice. It's the simplest way to stay on top of things in a busy world. Click Add to Chrome and take the first step toward a more organized life.

The Time Champ Chrome Extension is a browser tool that tracks user interactions by monitoring mouse clicks and the web pages visited. As a key component of the Time Champ system, it collects data for productivity analysis. The extension operates quietly in the background, capturing click events and recording the URLs of the websites users access. This data is then transmitted to the Time Champ server for real-time reporting and insights, enabling administrators to track web activity, ensure compliance, and optimize workflows.

CopyGOAT: Auto Text Expander for Google Chrome
No. #1 Text Expander - Create custom keyboard shortcuts to expand and replace text as you type.

Let's be honest about traditional text expanders. They are built to save you time, but they often end up giving you a new, frustrating job: memorizing dozens of obscure keyboard shortcuts. When you are rushing to reply to a client or send an outreach email, trying to remember if your shortcut was "/thanks", "/thx", or "/ty" causes cognitive overload. Instead of typing faster, you freeze, search your memory, or end up typing the whole message manually anyway.
CopyGOAT was built to fix this exact problem. It is a text expander that forgives your memory.

With CopyGOAT, forgetting a shortcut is perfectly fine. You do not need a photographic memory to use your templates. Just type your trigger key (like "/") and start typing a related word. A smart, visual suggestion menu instantly appears right at your cursor. You can see your snippets, search them on the fly, and insert them with a single keystroke. It is fast, visual, and completely stress-free.

Whether you are in customer support, sales, recruiting, or simply tired of typing the same email responses over and over, CopyGOAT adapts to your workflow with powerful, professional features.

Core Features:

Smart Auto-Suggest Menu
Never memorize a shortcut again. Type your prefix, and a sleek dropdown menu appears right where you are typing. Browse, filter, and select your canned responses without breaking your focus.

Dynamic Smart Variables
Do not just paste static text. Make your snippets intelligent. Automatically insert today's date, your current clipboard content, or the URL of the page you are currently viewing.

Custom Fill-in-the-Blank Placeholders
Need to personalize an email? Create custom variables like {{First Name}} or {{Price}}. When you trigger the snippet, CopyGOAT will prompt you to fill in these exact details before pasting the final, polished message.

Advanced Rich Text Formatting
Your templates should not look like plain text robots. The built-in editor allows you to add bold text, bulleted lists, hyperlinks, custom text colors, and even images directly into your snippets.

Domain-Specific Snippets
Keep your workspace perfectly organized. You can set specific templates to only appear on certain websites. Show your support templates only on Zendesk, and your networking outreach templates only on LinkedIn.

Seamless Google Drive Sync
If you work across multiple computers, your templates should follow you. Connect your Google Drive once, and your entire snippet library will silently sync in the background. No manual file transfers required.

Secure Data Export and Import
Have full control over your data. Export your entire snippet library as a JSON file for local backup or share it with your team members to standardize your company's communication.

Privacy First Approach
Your templates, emails, and snippets are your private data. CopyGOAT does not store your snippets on proprietary cloud servers. Your data lives locally on your browser and syncs securely through your own personal Google Drive account. 

Stop wasting mental energy trying to remember abbreviations. Upgrade your typing workflow with a visual snippet manager that works the way your brain actually does.

Better Chat: Chat Power-Ups for Google Meet™
Supercharge your Google Meet™ experience with Better Chat, the ultimate Chrome extension for enhancing chat functionality in your…

Supercharge your Google Meet™ experience with Better Chat, the ultimate Chrome extension for enhancing chat functionality in your meetings! Whether you're a frequent user or just want to take your Meet experience to the next level, Better Chat offers a wide range of features designed to improve chat interaction, streamline communication, and provide advanced tools for both casual and professional use. 🚀

Key Features:
 - Enhanced Chat Interface 💬
    Upgrade to a feature-rich chat window that includes persistent chat history, even for late joiners.
 - Dark Mode for Chat 🌙
    Easily switch to dark mode for more comfort.
 - Auto Mic Muting 🎤
    Automatically mute your mic when entering a meeting.
 - Auto Camera Disabling 📷
    Automatically turn off your camera when you join a meeting for privacy.
 - Auto Join Meetings ⏱️
    Auto join scheduled meetings at the exact start time, or a few minutes later.
 - Transcription Tab 📝
    Scroll back through full realtime meeting transcriptions.
 - Lobby Notifier 🔔
    Get a notification chime whenever someone joins the call, ensuring you never miss the start of a meeting.
 - Reactions to Messages 👍😂
    React to and see reactions on messages for more interactive chats.
 - Mention Users and Reply to Messages ✉️

Why Better Chat?
Better Chat is continuously updated with new features and improvements based on user feedback and extensive testing. The extension is designed to seamlessly integrate into your Google Meet™ experience, adding powerful new tools while maintaining ease of use. 🔧✨

Latest Updates:
Image Sharing in Chat 🖼️

Bug Fixes & Improvements 🔄: Regular updates ensure stability and performance, with the latest version fixing various bugs and adding new features based on user requests.

Join the growing community of Better Chat users and transform the way you interact in Google Meet™. Install now and discover what Better Chat can do for you! 🌟

Stay tuned for more exciting features and improvements in upcoming updates!

Check Managed logs device information to an unauthenticated data sink.

Check Managed will send logs to an unauthenticated data sink. The extension must be force installed by the admin. 

Sample DataSink in AppsScript with Google Sheets and BigQuery configurations. https://bit.ly/datasink

Managed JSON Settings:

  {"posturl":{"Value":""},
  "schemaurl":{"Value":""},
  "ipurl":{"Value":""},
  "period": {"Value":5},
  "frequency":{"Value":2},
  "tabactivity": {"Value":false},
  "debug": {"Value":false}}

posturl: The url to send an unauthenticated POST request of the data array. 
schemaurl: The url to send the BigQuery schema
ipurl: The url for a GET request to retrieve the IP and Geolocation, ie http://ip-api.com/json/
period: The amount of minutes to wait before sending the collected cache of data to the post url.
frequency: The amount of minutes to wait before requesting device information
tabactivity: Sets to list to changes in tabs and records. Could be more noise than needed
debug: If true sends the logging information to the browser console log

Starter Data Sink: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12Zy7OrwjhBBQlTS2GmrTCbge5WX8YEBUUaf4YVQm1Rs/copy

Data Gathered:
Agent: UserAgent information
archName: Architecture
Chrome Version: Calculated from the UserAgent
City: From the IPurl
Country: From the IPurl
countryCode: From the IPurl
Email: Authenticated user email
User id: Authenticated user id
Annotated Location  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console annotation
Device AssetId (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console annotation
Device Hostname  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console annotation
Device Serial number  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the Device
Directory ID  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console device policy
IP: From the IPurl
IPv4 (if available, only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the device
IPv6 (if available, only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the device
Ismanaged: Calculated boolean based on if there is a serial number
Isp: From the IPurl
Latitude: From the IPurl
Longitude: From the IPurl
Mac address (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the device
Modelname: From the chrome.system.cpu
Numberofprocessors: From the chrome.system.cpu
Operating system: From the User Agent
Platform:  From the chrome.system.cpu
Region: From the IPurl
Regionname: From the IPurl
Tabid: Tab Id
Timestamp: time of data capture
Timezone: From the IPurl
windowId: Window Id
Zip: From the IPurl


GitHub https://github.com/chromeos/check-managed-extension

GPT Context - Use ChatGPT To Chat With Any Webpages
GPT Context – A ChatGPT Chrome Extension

GPT Context is a ChatGPT Chrome extension that seamlessly integrates ChatGPT into your browser. Chat with any websites, summarize articles, brainstorm ideas, improve writing, and get instant AI assistance—all without switching tabs!

🚀 Designed for students, professionals, content creators, and researchers, GPT Context helps you draft, edit, summarize, translate, and analyze content effortlessly. Plus, it works with PDFs and documents opened in Chrome, making it a must-have productivity tool.

✨ Key Features:
✅ Chat with any webpage – Get AI-powered insights instantly by asking any questions about the website
✅ One-click ChatGPT tools to perform most command tasks – Summarize, Improve, Grammar Check, Translate & more.
✅ Instant writing, editing & research support – Save time & boost efficiency.
✅ Works with PDFs & documents – Enhance productivity in your workflow.
✅ Seamless & fast – No need to copy-paste, just activate and go!

📌 How to Use GPT Context:
1️⃣ Visit the Chrome Web Store
2️⃣ Search for "GPT Context"
3️⃣ Click “Add to Chrome” to install
4️⃣ Open any website or document in Chrome
5️⃣ Right click anywhere or select some content from the page then right click to open the GPT Context menu
6️⃣ Select options to Summarize, Improve, Grammar Check, Explain, Translate or Ask any questions to open the GPT Context chatbox
7️⃣ Enjoy the AI-powered assistant without leaving your tab!

🔥 Install GPT Context now and experience the smarter way to work with ChatGPT in Chrome!

🌐 Learn more: https://www.gptcontext.app
FavText is Research Made Easy chrome extension. With FavText, you can bookmark your favourite text on the Internet. This could be…

FavText is Research Made Easy chrome extension. With FavText, you can bookmark your favourite text on the Internet. This could be on a web site or in a social media handle. As long as this line is publicly visible you can bookmark it.

The bookmark remembers the text, the URL, and has additional attributes as Line name, Author name, metadata and categories for easy search, referencing and collaboration. Using these attributes you can set an easy to record, access, download or share your records.

You can add more context to your bookmarks with these parameters.
Line Name: Can put 1-3 word title to remember this line. Basically, summarize your note or bookmark.
Author Name: Give credit to the author.
Category: There are hundreds of public categories. Enter a letter and autocomplete shows categories. Select what you need. Else, enter your own category name. This would be remembered and shown in future FavTexts. You can customize these categories for subject-based indexing or collaboration.
Metadata: Select from  auto-metadata suggestions or enter your comma separated list of metadata.

Suggested Use Cases
Bookmark any line or para you read on the Internet. Build your own quotes library, tips gallery or track subscriptions.
Perform Structured Research. When writing a blog, working on a detailed presentation or research, you can create own category and save hundreds, and even thousands of bookmarks. Later use these records for bibliography management or reference tracking.
Collaboration. You can define a common category and share in a group of users. All bookmarks saved by all users in the group are accessible to all members. 

Start intelligent bookmarking today.
Potencialize sua experiência no WhatsApp Web com essa extensão.

Potencialize sua experiência no WhatsApp Web com essa extensão.

- ✅ Ícone de Acesso Rápido: Adiciona um ícone do WhatsApp na barra do navegador para abrir uma interface com um campo de input para digitar ou colar um número de telefone, junto com um botão "Abrir" ou "Falar".
- ✅ Abrir no WhatsApp com Botão Direito: Permite selecionar um texto, clicar com o botão direito e escolher a opção "Abrir no WhatsApp". O número é formatado e o link para o WhatsApp é aberto.
- ✅ Colar da Área de Transferência: Possibilidade de colar automaticamente o conteúdo da área de transferência ao abrir a interface de acesso rápido.
- ✅ Abrir Sidebar no WhatsApp Web: Para usar funções avançadas
- ✅ Templates de Mensagens: Oferece a opção de utilizar templates de mensagens para facilitar o envio de mensagens para contatos.
- ✅ Autenticação com Google Contatos : Agora é possível autenticar-se com a conta do Google para facilitar o processo de salvar contatos e ter acesso rápido aos contatos já adicionados.
- ✅ Opção de Abertura por WhatsApp Web ou Desktop: Agora, a extensão apresenta um menu de configurações. Dentro desse menu, há uma opção chamada "Abrir preferencialmente por", que permite escolher entre "WhatsApp Web" e "WhatsApp Desktop". Essa preferência determina como os links serão gerados, seja no campo de input, ao abrir seus contatos do google ou ao clicar no ícone próximo aos números. Essa configuração é salva localmente para facilitar o uso futuro.
- ✅ Atalho na Barra Lateral : Agora, na barra lateral, você tem um campo para inserir um número e abrir o WhatsApp Web com apenas um clique em "Abrir". Permite iniciar uma conversa com um contato já existente ou um novo chat.
- ✅ Etiquetas para Contatos : Adiciona a funcionalidade de marcar contatos com etiquetas, como "Lead", "Negociando", "Agendado", "Proposta", "Contrato", "Cliente", "Perdido". Essas etiquetas são armazenadas lista de chats. Também é possível filtrar chats por etiqueta na coluna de chats.

Nota: Este é um resumo das funcionalidades já implementadas. O projeto pode estar em constante evolução e receber atualizações adicionais.
